description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and tie. The suit jacket features a lapel pin or badge on the left side, adding a touch of distinction. The figure's hands are positioned in a gesturing manner, suggesting he may be engaged in conversation or presentation. He has neatly groomed short hair and a trimmed beard, giving him a professional appearance. The figure is wearing athletic-style shoes, which contrast with the formal attire. The overall build is slender and proportionate, with realistic human anatomy and posture.
description: A male adult in a formal business suit with a tie, gesturing with his hands and wearing athletic shoes. He has short hair, a trimmed beard, and a professional demeanor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, tie, lapel pin, facial features, and both hands gesturing outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the forward gesture of the left hand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, the figure's posture, and the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right hand's gesture, the suit's side seam, and the profile of the head and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie
